ideation: This animation sequence will represent the atom symbol using a circular motion of both arms. The arms will start at the sides, then move upward and outward in a circular motion, and finally return to their starting position. The circular motion will symbolize the orbiting electrons in an atom. The sequence will consist of 4 frames. Frame 1: Arms are at the sides. Frame 2: Arms are raised and outward. Frame 3: Arms return to the sides. Frame 4: Arms come together in front of the body.

frames.beat: arms hang at the sides, at rest
arms sweep up and out in a wide circle
arms continue the circle, moving inward
arms meet in the center, the atom forms
